Litigation Paralegal | Hamlin, Hamlin & McGill | Albuquerque, NM

details.title: Litigation Paralegal
bullets: Conducted pre-claim investigation, legal research, and initial case assessments.
Drafted pleadings, motions, and appellate documents.
Performed variety of administrative duties, such as organizing case files and calendar hearings.

content.text: Counselor | Camp Acadia Cutler | Cutler, ME

details.title: Counselor
bullets: Led excursions and daily programming for middle schoolers at summer camp in coastal Maine.
Worked with students with learning disabilities, exhibiting flexibility and compassion while helping them build problem-solving and teamwork skills.
Earned CPR certification and completed behavioral health training course.

content.text: Campaign Intern | Karen Bass Mayoral Campaign | Los Angeles, CA

details.title: Campaign Intern
bullets: Researched voter values and tailored talking points to campaign events.
Traveled door to door to represent Mayor BassŌĆÖs campaign messaging and promote her candidacy.
Assisted in planning and organizing rallies, press releases, and other public-facing, campaign-related events.

content.text: Debate Coach | Jorge D. Mendoza Charter Academy | Los Angeles, CA

details.title: Debate Coach
bullets: Coached and mentored team of fifth and sixth graders at a Los Angeles high school.
Created online programming for team to continue to build skills and camaraderie during Covid-19 pandemic.
Won multiple tournaments in the Golden West Debate League.

content.text: Senior Class Co-President | Scripps Associated Students (SAS) | Claremont, CA

details.title: Senior Class Co-President
bullets: Act as key member of Officer Board, representing class and student body interests to administration and trustees.
Work to improve Scripps policies and procedures and ensure that SAS is representing the best interests of students.
Advocate for peers and empower student body to live confidently, courageously, and collaboratively.

content.text: Student Representative | Scripps Associated Students (SAS) | Claremont, CA | Student Representative

details.title: Student Representative
bullets: Act as key member of Officer Board, representing class and student body interests to administration and trustees.
Work to improve Scripps policies and procedures and ensure that SAS is representing the best interests of students.

content.text: Co-Manager | Outdoor Wilderness Leaders (OWL) | Claremont, CA

details.title: Co-Manager
bullets: Recruit Scripps students to join trips involving hiking, camping, back packing, and skiing.
Provide supportive and safe environment for women to explore the outdoors and meet friends.
Plan and execute day- and weekend-long trips, including logistics, renting equipment, and budget management.
